headline: Gilead Sciences Is Betting on a Bavarian Biotech For Its Comeback
summary: This is Gilead's third acquisition this year alone. At this point, M&A is less about growth and more about survival for the pharma major.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Gilead Sciences (GILD) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Gilead Sciences at around US$140 per share still offers value, you are not alone. The answer depends on how you look at what the market is pricing in. The stock has returned 2.8% over the last week, while the 30 day return sits at a 2.6% decline, alongside year to date and 1 year returns of 15.2% and 36.3%, and an 87.8% and 161.1% return over 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines around Gilead have focused on its position within large cap biotech and ongoing interest...

headline: EQT Life Sciences to exit minority stake in Tubulis via sale to Gilead Sciences for up to USD 5.0 billion
summary: EQT Life Sciences is pleased to announce that the LSP 7 fund ("EQT Life Sciences") has exited its minority stake in Tubulis (the "Company"), a Germany-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs), through a sale to Gilead Sciences [Nasdaq: GILD].

headline: Gilead to acquire Tubulis GmbH for up to $5 billion
summary: April 7 () - Gilead said on Tuesday it would acquire private Germany-based Tubulis GmbH for ‌up to $5 billion, as the U. drugmaker ‌looks to boost its pipeline with a lucrative class of ​experimental cancer drugs referred to as "guided missiles".

headline: Gilead to Acquire Tubulis Adding Potentially Best-in-Class Antibody-Drug Conjugate and Next Generation Platform to Further Strengthen Oncology Pipeline
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif. & MUNICH, April 07, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) today announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tubulis GmbH, a private Germany-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs), building on Gilead’s oncology pipeline, focused on addressing areas of high unmet need.

raw.headline: Gilead to Acquire Tubulis Adding Potentially Best-in-Class Antibody-Drug Conjugate and Next Generation Platform to Further Strengthen Oncology Pipeline
raw.summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif. & MUNICH, April 07, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD) today announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tubulis GmbH, a private Germany-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs), building on Gilead’s oncology pipeline, focused on addressing areas of high unmet need.

headline: Gilead continues M&A surge with $3.1B deal for ADC specialist Tubulis
summary: Gilead’s third acquisition since late February hands it a technology designed to make antibody-drug conjugates less toxic and multiple cancer medicines already in clinical testing.

headline: Neurocrine Scoops Up Hunger-Drug Maker in Latest Multi-Billion-Dollar Pharma Deal
summary: Soleno Therapeutics's Vykat XR is the first drug to be approved for treating the insatiable hunger caused by Prader-Willi Syndrome.
